description_long: This is a modern smartwatch with a square, black face and a dark blue silicone strap. The watch face features a digital display with multiple colorful app icons arranged in a grid, reminiscent of the Apple Watch interface. The case is sleek and slightly rounded at the edges, with a prominent side button and a digital crown on the right side. The back of the watch appears to have a circular sensor area, likely for heart rate or biometric monitoring, surrounded by a metallic ring. The strap is continuous and flexible, designed for comfort and durability, and attaches seamlessly to the watch case. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A sleek, square-faced smartwatch with a dark blue silicone strap and a colorful digital app display. The design is modern, minimalist, and functional, ideal for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square digital display with colorful app icons and the dark blue strap.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the digital crown, side button, and the curved profile of the watch case.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the continuous dark blue strap and the thickness of the watch case.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view revealing the circular sensor area on the back and the seamless strap attachment.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is a digital touchscreen with a grid of colorful circular app icons, no traditional markers or numerals, and a minimalist, modern style.
attribute_strap_type: Continuous silicone strap, flexible and smooth, with no visible stitching or texture.
attribute_watch_face_display: Digital display with app icons, no analog hands or numerals, touch-interactive with no visible complications.
